info:
uspopageR Documentation

Age distribution of population in the United States, 1900-2002

Description

These are the estimated (not counted) values by the U.S. Census.

Variables

  • Year

  • AgeGroup

  • Thousands: Number of people, in thousands.

Source

U.S. Census Bureau, Statistical Abstract of the United States, 2003, HS-3: http://www.census.gov/statab/hist/HS-03.pdf and www.census.gov/statab/hist/02HS0003.xls.

config.subtitle: gcookbook - uspopage
config.title: Age distribution of population in the United States
